page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd Official Visual Book
text:
is a book for Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd video game by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 04 February 2005. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047071757 

Overview

Includes original illustrations by famous illustrators, as well as various illustrations for telephone cards and posters. High-quality CG and a story digest that covers all routes to look back on the main story. In addition to the shortest strategy chart and supplementary data for the album, there are also a large amount of CG original drawings for events in the game.
